TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Vajiralongkorn ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Vajiralongkorn, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Thailand ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *ajiraloŇčkorn rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *ajiraloŇčkorn, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw tńßailan* ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *ajiraloŇčkorn, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Vajiralongkorn ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Vajiralongkorn, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Thailand ta' misuw hya' ga Vajiralongkorn, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *ajiraloŇčkorn rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *ajiraloŇčkorn, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw tńßailan* ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *ajiraloŇčkorn, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
